patches_modified.name: Free in-app purchases
patches_modified.description: Skips Google Play Billing and credits IAP items (crystal packs, tribe skins) directly. Patches the billing bridge to report success, forces Purchase.isAcknowledged() and getPurchaseState() to return valid values, and swallows purchase errors so no error dialog appears.

patches_modified.name: Unlock all tribes
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all 20 tribes (Xinxi, Imperius, Bardur, Oumaji, Kickoo, Hoodrick, Luxidoor, Vengir, Zebasi, Aimo, Aquarion, Elyrion, Polaris, Magma, Yadakk, Quetzali, Cymanti, Swamp, Ikarus, Urkaz) and all skins by patching the native IL2CPP library (libil2cpp.so). Makes IsTribeUnlocked() and IsSkinUnlocked() always return true via ARM64 hex patching.

patches_added.name: Increase Daily Limits
patches_added.description: Forces daily usage and other limits to 500 when loading from server.
